channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: The world’s reaction to hantavirus is tinged by echoes of something else: COVID
item.description: The coronavirus pandemic’s impact lingers, influencing our lives in both obvious and subtle ways. Work-from-home jobs, mask-wearing and hand sanitizers are now common.

item.title: Small cities in big Texas metro areas lead as the fastest growing municipalities in the US
Emails show FBI Director Kash Patel’s Hawaii trip included ‘VIP snorkel’ at a Pearl Harbor memorial
